hero_description: Jamia Sher-e-Rabbani is a premier Islamic institution dedicated to nurturing the next generation of scholars through comprehensive education and spiritual growth.
why_choose_us_feature_1_desc: Learn from world-class scholars with degrees from Al-Azhar, Medina, and other prestigious universities.
why_choose_us_feature_2_desc: A serene and spiritually uplifting campus dedicated to the pursuit of sacred knowledge.
why_choose_us_feature_3_desc: We focus on Tarbiyah alongside academic excellence to produce balanced leaders for the Ummah.
why_choose_us_feature_4_desc: Comprehensive mentoring, career guidance, and financial assistance for deserving students.
why_choose_us_experience_text: Years of excellence in Islamic and modern education.
academic_programs_1_desc: Complete memorization of the Holy Quran with Tajweed rules.
academic_programs_2_desc: Comprehensive Islamic scholarship program covering Fiqh, Hadith, and Tafseer.
academic_programs_3_desc: Specialized course in the art of Quranic recitation.
academic_programs_4_desc: Intensive course focusing on classical and modern Arabic grammar.
academic_programs_5_desc: Advanced specialization in Fiqh, Hadith, and Islamic Jurisprudence.
faculty_spotlight_description: Learn from esteemed educators dedicated to the preservation of sacred knowledge.
faculty_member_1_bio: An expert in Fiqh with over 20 years of teaching experience in leading Islamic institutions.
faculty_member_2_bio: Specializing in the authentication and interpretation of Sahih collections.
testimonial_quote: Jamia Sher-e-Rabbani provided me with the spiritual grounding and academic rigor I needed to serve my community.
faculty_hero_subtitle: Meet the esteemed scholars and educators dedicated to nurturing knowledge and character.
faculty_careers_desc: Jamia Sher-e-Rabbani is always looking for qualified scholars and dedicated educators who are passionate about Islamic learning and academic excellence.

about_mission_desc: To preserve and disseminate sacred Islamic knowledge through academic excellence and spiritual devotion.
about_vision_desc: To be a leading global institution for Islamic learning and character building, rooted in tradition.
about_history_desc: Founded with the vision of reviving the classical Islamic educational model for the modern age.
about_hero_subtitle: A legacy of knowledge, spirituality, and service to the Ummah for over two decades.
about_journey_p1: Established in 1995, Jamia has grown from a small local Madrasa into a renowned institution of higher learning.
about_journey_p2: We continue to evolve while staying true to our foundational values of Taqwa, Sabr, and Khidmat.
A comprehensive collection of Tajweed an: A comprehensive collection of Tajweed and Qira'at lessons designed to help students improve Quran recitation, pronunciation, Makharij, and practical Tajweed rules.
academic_programs_6_desc: Advanced specialized Dars-e-Nizami focusing on scholarly research and Fiqh.
Complete Quran recitation with authentic: Complete Quran recitation with authentic Urdu translation for better understanding of the Holy Book.
Beautiful recitation of the Holy Quran i: Beautiful recitation of the Holy Quran in Arabic, focusing on Tajweed and proper pronunciation.
Quran recitation paired with English tra: Quran recitation paired with English translation for students and researchers worldwide.

Join a legacy of excellence. Secure your: Join a legacy of excellence. Secure your future in Islamic scholarship through our modernized, efficient, and student-focused admission process.
We have streamlined our application proc: We have streamlined our application procedure to ensure that prospective students can apply from anywhere with ease.
Fill out the online application form wit: Fill out the online application form with your personal and academic details.
Upload clear scans of your ID cards, pho: Upload clear scans of your ID cards, photographs, and previous result cards.
Our academic committee will review your: Our academic committee will review your files and schedule an entrance interview.
Once selected, pay your admission fee to: Once selected, pay your admission fee to secure your seat and receive your student ID.
If you face any issues while filling the: If you face any issues while filling the form, contact our Academic Support office.
A baseline test for Arabic and Quran pro: A baseline test for Arabic and Quran proficiency to determine the appropriate starting class level.
Dedicated and secure boarding facilities: Dedicated and secure boarding facilities are available for out-of-city students with strict discipline.
Scholarships and Zakat-funded support ar: Scholarships and Zakat-funded support are available for deserving students who cannot afford the fees.
File size should be less than 5MB: File size should be less than 5MB
Applicants must be between 5 and 80 year: Applicants must be between 5 and 80 years old for various departments.
Clear copies of NADRA ID/B-Form, Father': Clear copies of NADRA ID/B-Form, Father's CNIC, and previous marksheets/result cards are mandatory.
All students must pass a basic Quran rec: All students must pass a basic Quran recitation and character assessment interview.
Please enter a valid 13-digit CNIC numbe: Please enter a valid 13-digit CNIC number.
